heading: Organization
label: 21301 Organization
text: American Historical Association (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a body corporate and politic in the District of Columbia.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2130136:20 (1st sentence words before “for the promotion”)., (1st sentence words before “for the promotion”), .Jan. 4, 1889, ch. 2025 Stat. 640This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.
